purpose: Bridge-free conditional plan for Ramsey/T2star and 13C follow-up if reimage1804_c01 strong-pi pODMR gives a clear usable resonance.
prerequisite: Do not execute this plan unless terminal pODMR raw/readout-aware review supports a clear usable resonance/alignment. If pODMR fails no-data/count-gate, treat as tracking/freshness evidence; if complete but no resonance, reject this candidate and move to fallback candidate.

field_and_13c_model.calculation: B=(f_res-D)/gamma_e for the ms=+1 transition; f_13C=gamma_13C*B.

distinguishability_model.caveat: Shot-noise floor is optimistic; raw readouts, drift, normalization artifacts, and fit residuals must be reviewed.

advisory_requirements_before_execute: queue idle and no running bridge job
terminal pODMR resonance center is valid and candidate is not rejected
parse verifier/advisory JSON verdict, not just return code
use even averages under snake scan order
if advisory tracking window exceeds cap, reduce tau points first while keeping Nyquist > det + f_13C; then reduce repetitions/total shots if needed
analysis_required_after_terminal_ramsey: raw readout plot and reference-aware normalization views
fit a decaying sinusoid or suitable physical/empirical model for T2star only after signal is visible
FFT residual/oscillation to check for sidebands near det +/- f_13C; do not claim nearby 13C from an isolated low-SNR FFT peak

conditional_branching: If pODMR has no clear usable resonance: reject reimage1804_c01 and move to reimage1804_c02.
If pODMR fails before data/count-gate: treat as freshness/tracking evidence; consider retrack or re-image before candidate rejection.
If pODMR is clear but center is broad/uncertain for Ramsey detuning: consider weak-pi pODMR center refinement before Ramsey.
If pODMR is clear and center is sufficient: verify/advisory a Ramsey scout based on this plan; execute only after queue idle and gates pass.
